rationale: Proposed change directly amends the dollar amount in §11.13(b). No other provision of §11.13 references or depends on the $140,000 figure, creating no internal statutory conflict.
quote: An adult is entitled to exemption from taxation by a school district of $140,000 of the appraised value of the adult's residence homestead
_note: Potential constitutional constraint under Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c) not assessed; constitutional text not provided in rule_text. The $140,000 amount was most recently set by Acts 2025, 89th Leg., Ch. 338 (S.B. 4), eff. November 4, 2025.
